B2B Will inform us

If I manage my calendar well alongside my other tasks, registering new restaurants won’t be difficult especially if I get the contact lists from the B2B team. I can easily handle the registration process directly from my phone.

Also, our pricing plays a big role in this. It really matters.

We have received many complaints from our customers about previous quality problems and pricing issues. So if we improve the product quality and offer better prices, we can increase customer satisfaction and attract more customers

In my opinion, I'm not very strong in communication and I'm don’t have much experience in that area. As a team, we are much better at digital work like videos, graphics, and social media. So it would be better for us to focus on what we do best.

In my opinion, this project can be handled more effectively by our sales team or agents because they have strong communication skills and the ability to cover large areas in Addis Ababa. They are better positioned to approach restaurants, cafés, hotels, and catering businesses directly and build relationships.
To successfully secure 15 active partners, we may need to approach around 150–200 restaurants and related businesses, since not all of them will agree to work with us immediately. Large outreach increases the chance of securing serious and long-term customers.
However, contacting 200 plus businesses alone would be very difficult for me. Therefore, distributing this responsibility among sales agents would be more realistic, efficient, and productive.

So i believe we can do more in digital way rather than this way we can also track everything in one sheet which is also good to track our perormance, and also the quality and price issue needed to be fixed to onboard more long term customers.

For this project, I recommend promoting it through video and boosting it online. It’s more efficient and can generate high impressions. Door-to-door promotion is not easy and can be challenging when communicating our services to new people.
